name: No-Code MVP Agency
description: An agency that helps non-technical founders build their Minimum Viable Product (MVP) using tools like Bubble, Webflow, and Zapier within 2 weeks.
problem: Founders spend months and lakhs of rupees trying to build initial prototypes.
solution: Rapid prototyping using No-Code platforms at a fraction of the cost.
steps: Master Bubble/Webflow
Create an agency landing page
Cold outreach to founders on Twitter/LinkedIn
Deliver first 3 projects at a discount for testimonials

name: Local SEO Audits as a Service
description: Selling one-time, highly detailed SEO action plans to local businesses (dentists, plumbers, cafes) to help them rank higher on Google Maps.
problem: Local businesses lose customers because they do not appear in top local search results.
solution: A standardized, easy-to-read audit and checklist to fix their Google Business Profile.
steps: Learn Google Business SEO
Scrape local businesses with poor rankings

name: AI Cover Letter Generator
description: A simple web app where users upload their resume and a job description, and AI generates a perfectly tailored cover letter in seconds.
problem: Writing custom cover letters for hundreds of job applications is exhausting and time-consuming.

problem: Brands struggle to know if the influencers they hired actually drove sales or just bot traffic.

steps: Identify metric APIs (Instagram, TikTok)
Build the dashboard MVP

name: SaaS Subscription Tracker

name: API as a Service: Web Scraper
description: A reliable REST API that developers can call to bypass CAPTCHAs and scrape data from complex, dynamic websites.
problem: Developers struggle with IP bans, proxies, and headless browsers when building data aggregation tools.
solution: A simple API endpoint that handles the proxy rotation and browser rendering automatically.

Build the Puppeteer/Playwright rendering engine
Create documentation and API keys system

name: Boutique Ergonomic Furniture

problem: Most ergonomic chairs are ugly and look like they belong in a 1990s corporate cubicle.
